title: Restate and compare a corrected report
preconditions: The predecessor snapshot exists and passes integrity and compatibility checks; current compatible public producer evidence can be bound coherently; the request identifies permitted formula and threshold versions.
postconditions: The predecessor is byte-semantically unchanged. An exactly unchanged candidate produces No Change and no new snapshot. A changed candidate produces exactly one linked Restatement only after complete success. No upstream state changed.
main_flow: 1. INSIGHTS loads but never modifies the predecessor. 2. It generates a candidate report through the same coherent on-demand workflow using current cited evidence and selected versions. 3. It compares producer identities, policy versions, report schema, and semantic content with the predecessor. 4. If all compared values are unchanged, it returns No Change and creates no snapshot. 5. Otherwise it computes a deterministic difference summary separating source-provenance, formula or threshold, exact metric, signal-state, explanation, and Attention Item changes. 6. It atomically appends the changed Report Snapshot with one explicit Restatement link to the predecessor and returns both the new report and bounded difference evidence.
alt_flows: Unknown, corrupted, deleted, or incompatible predecessor returns failure and creates no restatement.
Current evidence is unavailable or incoherent, so no partial restatement or diff is retained.
The request attempts to overwrite the predecessor or reconstruct uncaptured historical source state and is rejected.
Commit or fingerprint failure preserves the predecessor and existing restatement chain unchanged.
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner explicitly requests a restatement of one retained Report Snapshot after source corrections or a selected formula or threshold version change.","status":"draft"}
